headline: ZUMZ  Q4 Earnings Beat Estimates, Strong Comparable Sales Drive Revenues
summary: Zumiez beats Q4 earnings estimates as strong North America comps and holiday sales drive revenue and margin growth.

headline: Does the VSCO 2026 Sales Forecast Signal a Major Turnaround?
summary: Victoria's Secret expects fiscal 2026 sales of $6.85B-$6.95B as international expansion and renewed focus on bras drive growth.

raw.headline: Does the VSCO 2026 Sales Forecast Signal a Major Turnaround?
raw.summary: Victoria's Secret expects fiscal 2026 sales of $6.85B-$6.95B as international expansion and renewed focus on bras drive growth.

headline: GIII Stock Falls 11% After Q4 Earnings Miss Estimates & Sales Dip Y/Y
summary: G-III Apparel stock drops 11% after Q4 EPS and sales miss estimates amid licensing exits and a Saks bankruptcy disruption.
